objective: Document complete reproducible path for pocket-conditioned flow-matching molecular generation with unseen-pocket generalization claim.
one_command_reproduction: cargo run --release --bin pocket_diffusion -- research unseen-pocket --config configs/flow_matching_claim_contract.json && cargo run --release --bin pocket_diffusion -- research multi-seed --config configs/unseen_pocket_multi_seed_pdbbindpp_flow.json

step_by_step_reproduction.description: Run optimized best-candidate config (from F2.1 sweep)

configuration_artifacts.purpose: Machine-checkable claim/threshold contract (3 claims FC1-FC3, hard gates, artifact checklist)
Pins 3 canonical configs with sha256 fingerprints; enables deterministic reproduction

sweep_and_optimization.purpose: F2.1 sweep orchestrator (grid over loss weights, flow knobs)
5 candidates, winner candidate_001 (score 6.653); optimal loss weights
F2.2 best-candidate config with optimized loss weights

ablation_and_diagnostics.purpose: F3.1 ablation matrix (9 variants covering slots, cross-attention, probes)
F3.1 completion artifact (ablation results, component necessity evidence)

method_comparison.purpose: F4.2 method comparison config and delta metrics

verification_checklist: ✓ All experiment configs validate (cargo run --bin pocket_diffusion -- validate --kind experiment ...)
✓ Canonical configs reproducible via config hash verification
✓ Multi-seed results show stable aggregates (mean/std) within FC3 thresholds
✓ Ablation components show necessity (all variants degrade)
✓ Method comparison shows flow advantage (>=5% vs denoising, >=8% vs reranker)
✓ Diagnostics extracted and gate/slot utilization confirmed

reproducibility_requirements.data_split_determinism: split_seed=42 in all canonical configs; data split is deterministic
reproducibility_requirements.randomness_control: All generation seeds controlled via corruption_seed, sampling_seed; multi-seed uses explicit seed list
reproducibility_requirements.external_backends: Chemistry (RDKit), docking/pocket (custom Python backends) called via subprocess with documented argument contracts
reproducibility_requirements.output_paths: All checkpoints use relative paths; results reproducible on any machine with Rust toolchain + Python dependencies

failure_recovery.config_validation_fails: Check config schema against flow_matching_claim_contract.json; re-run cargo run --bin pocket_diffusion -- validate --kind experiment
failure_recovery.training_diverges: Check loss_weights in f21_sweep_result_table.json; verify checkpoint_every and log_every frequencies
failure_recovery.multi_seed_variance_high: Increase seed count or check generation_target.coordinate_noise_std; verify split_seed consistency
failure_recovery.ablation_does_not_degrade: Verify component is actually disabled (e.g., check disable_slots=true takes effect)

paper_narrative_references.FC1_modular_representation_claim: configs/f42_method_comparison.json (pocket fit delta >=5% vs denoising, >=8% vs reranker)
paper_narrative_references.unseen_pocket_generalization: unseen_pocket_train/val/test split with pocket_cutoff_angstrom=7.5; all held-out pockets

deliverable_status: ✓ One-command reproduction available; ✓ step-by-step guide provided; ✓ artifact manifest complete; ✓ verification checklist ready; ✓ failure recovery documented
